description:
Write and execute an automation script to sample live telemetry from OpenC3 COSMOS and format it for a legacy system. Sample the INST target's HEALTH_STATUS packet 10 times at 1-second intervals, extracting TEMP1, TEMP2, and COLLECTS values. Export the data to /home/ga/Desktop/legacy_telemetry_export.xml using the following XML schema:

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<TelemetryExport target="INST" packet="HEALTH_STATUS">
    <Sample index="1" timestamp="[ISO 8601 Timestamp]">
        <Parameter name="TEMP1" value="[Value]" unit="C"/>
        <Parameter name="TEMP2" value="[Value]" unit="C"/>
        <Parameter name="COLLECTS" value="[Value]" unit="COUNT"/>
    </Sample>
    <!-- Samples 2 through 10 follow -->
</TelemetryExport>

The output must contain exactly 10 sequential Sample nodes with correct timestamps representing the time the sample was taken. OpenC3 password: Cosmos2024!
